game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **20 Minutes Till Dawn:** Players control a chosen character using a left virtual joystick for movement and a right virtual joystick for aiming and firing their equipped weapon in a top-down arena. The core loop involves surviving continuous waves of Cthulhu monsters for a set duration (e.g., 20 minutes) by eliminating them and collecting experience points, which trigger level-ups offering a choice of 3 out of 80+ temporary skill upgrades like increased fire rate, summoning lightning, or deploying fireballs. Between runs, players permanently unlock new characters, each with unique starting abilities, and various weapons such as revolvers or flamethrowers by spending currency earned from successful runs. Difficulty scales across 15 selectable levels, increasing monster spawn rates and health, while players can equip up to 3 permanent runes from a pool of 24, granting bonuses like infinite bullet penetration or an extra resurrection, to enhance their chances of survival. The game ends if the player's health reaches zero, with the objective being to complete the chosen time limit (10 or 20 minutes) or achieve the highest score in endless mode.
game_info.description: Survive waves of Cthulhu monsters in this intense top-down survival shooter. Eliminate enemies to gain experience and level up, choosing from powerful skill upgrades to enhance your abilities. Survive for 5 minutes to win, or see how long you can last. Your health depletes when hit - avoid enemies and use your growing arsenal of abilities to stay alive!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move your character in four directions
Space: Fire your weapon in the direction you're facing
Z: Activate special ability (when unlocked)
Enter: Start the game from the start screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause during gameplay
R: Return to start screen from game over

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and shooting test. Validates that the player can move around the arena and fire weapons at enemies. Tests basic collision detection and entity interaction.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move in a circular pattern around the arena while continuously firing. Engage enemies at medium range to test damage and collision systems. Collect experience orbs when they spawn.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully moves, fires weapon, damages enemies, and collects experience. No game crashes or physics anomalies. Player survives for at least 30 seconds demonstrating core mechanics work.

TEST_2.test_description: Win condition test. Validates that the player can survive the full duration and achieve victory. Tests complete game loop including leveling, upgrades, and endgame.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Implement optimal survival strategy: maintain distance from enemies, prioritize dangerous targets, collect all experience orbs, choose damage/survival upgrades when leveling. Use kiting patterns to control enemy positions.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player survives for 5 minutes (300 seconds), defeating enough enemies while managing health. Game transitions to GAME_OVER_WIN state. Victory screen displays with final stats.

TEST_3.test_description: Upgrade system test. Validates that leveling up provides meaningful choices and that upgrades correctly modify gameplay.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Rapidly collect experience to trigger multiple level-ups. Select different upgrade types (damage, fire rate, special abilities) and verify each applies correctly to gameplay.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Level-up screen appears at correct XP thresholds. Upgrades visibly affect player stats and combat effectiveness. All upgrade options function without errors.
